debug_info.goal:
n : ↑(Set.Ioi 1)
⊢ IsLeast
    {k |
      ∀ (A B : IMO2020P4.Company (↑n) k),
        ∃ i j, IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k A i j ∧ IMO2020P4.Company.linked (↑n) k B i j}
    (IMO2020P4.answer n)

failed_attempts:
let stations := Fin (n.1 ^ 2)
  let k := n.1 ^ 2 - n.1 + 1
  have h_answer : answer n = k := rfl
  rw [h_answer]
  sorry

constructor
  · intro A B
    sorry
  · intro k hk
    by_contra! h
    sorry

refine ⟨fun A B ↦ ?_, fun k hk ↦ ?_⟩
  · let S := Fin (n.1 ^ 2)
    let path_A (i : Fin (answer n)) : Fin (n.1 ^ 2) × Fin (n.1 ^ 2) := ((A.cars i).start, (A.cars i).finish)
    let path_B (i : Fin (answer n)) : Fin (n.1 ^ 2) × Fin (n.1 ^ 2) := ((B.cars i).start, (B.cars i).finish)
    have h_card : (n.1 - 1) ^ 2 < n.1 ^ 2 := by
      rw [sq, sq]; exact Nat.mul_self_lt_mul_self (Nat.sub_lt n.2.1 zero_lt_one)
    let fA (s : S) : Fin (n.1 - 1 + 1) := sorry
    let fB (s : S) : Fin (n.1 - 1 + 1) := sorry
    have : ∃ i j, i ≠ j ∧ (fA i, fB i) = (fA j, fB j) := sorry
    obtain ⟨i, j, hne, heq⟩ := this
    exact sorry
  · let A_cars (i : Fin k) : Car n.1 := sorry
    let B_cars (i : Fin k) : Car n.1 := sorry
    sorry

constructor
  · intro A B
    sorry
  · intro k hk
    sorry

constructor
  · intro A B
    sorry
  · intro k hk
    sorry

let s : ℕ := n ^ 2
  have hn : 1 < n := n.2
  have h_ans : answer n = s - n + 1 := rfl
  constructor
  · intro A B
    let r (C : Company n (answer n)) : BinaryRel (Fin s) := fun i j ↦ C.linked i j
    let f (C : Company n (answer n)) (i : Fin s) : ℕ × ℕ :=
      (Nat.find (fun m ↦ ∃ j, (C.linked m i ∨ m = i) ∧ (C.linked i j ∨ i = j)), 0)
    sorry
  · intro k hk
    by_contra! h
    simp [h_ans] at h
    let A : Company n k := sorry
    let B : Company n k := sorry
    obtain ⟨i, j, hA, hB⟩ := hk A B
    sorry
